mapper.select:
SELECT ROWNUM AS NO , NOTICE_SEQ , TITLE , CNT , EMP_ID , EMP_NAME , TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE , MAX_CNT , CEIL(MAX_CNT / #{pagePerRow}) AS TOTAL_PAGE FROM ( SELECT N.NOTICE_SEQ , N.TITLE , N.CNT , N.EMP_ID , N.EMP_NAME , N.REGI_DATE , COUNT(*) OVER() AS MAX_CNT FROM PDNM.NOTICE_BOARD N WHERE 1 = 1
AND N.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND N.EMP_NAME LIKE '%' || #{empName} || '%'
AND N.REGI_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND N.REGI_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
ORDER BY N.NOTICE_SEQ DESC ) OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pagePerRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pagePerRow} ROWS ONLY
SELECT NOTICE_SEQ , TITLE , CONTENTS , CNT , EMP_ID , EMP_NAME , TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE FROM PDNM.NOTICE_BOARD WHERE NOTICE_SEQ = #{noticeSeq}
